sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Called PRK at 2am when my boiler broke down in the middle of winter. Engineer arrived within the hour and had us back up and running quickly. Fantastic 24/7 service.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Really professional team. Fitted a new boiler and sorted our central heating the same day. Competitive pricing and very tidy work. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Used PRK for our annual gas safety certificate. Easy to book, arrived on time and very thorough. Will be using them again next year.

brand.usp: PRK Gas & Plumbing 24/7 Ltd delivers round-the-clock gas and plumbing solutions across Manchester, with Gas Safe registered engineers ready to respond to emergencies any time of day or night.
brand.about_paragraph: We're PRK Gas & Plumbing 24/7 Ltd, a Manchester-based team of Gas Safe registered engineers dedicated to keeping your home warm and safe at any hour. Whether it's a boiler breakdown at midnight or a routine annual service, we respond fast and work to the highest standards. Our 24/7 availability means you're never left in the cold — no matter when you need us.
